name: boards
description: Kanban-plugin task board with Templater date-routed card notes under beacon/boards/.

external_plugins.reason: Renders {{module_directory}}/To-Do-Board.md as an interactive kanban; without the plugin the board renders as plain markdown.

pre_install.reason: v0.1.1-era top-level Dataview-kanban file (project blueprint Board contribution); superseded by beacon/boards/To-Do-Board.md (Kanban-plugin format) at this blueprint's install.

post_install.message: Boards blueprint installed at beacon/boards/. REQUIRED: enable the Kanban community plugin (Settings → Community plugins → Browse → Kanban) AND the Templater 'Trigger Templater on new file creation' setting. Then click the Board nav-button from any note. Cards added in the kanban auto-route to beacon/boards/cards/YYYY/MM-MMMM/<title>.md via Templater. Note: any v0.1.1-era top-level boards/To-Do-Board.md was deleted by pre_install (backup at boards/To-Do-Board.md.pre_install_bak).
